feedback: The enterprise buyer said legal review is blocked because audit logs do not show who exported feedback evidence.
Admins want a way to restrict saved reports to specific roles before they invite more product teams.
The workspace setup was easy, but SSO validation status was unclear and support had to confirm it manually.
The VP of Product likes the evidence trail but needs SOC2 documentation linked inside the admin settings.
Reports are useful for leadership reviews, but executives asked for a clearer confidence score on each theme.
A manager deleted a workspace by mistake and expected all related feedback to disappear immediately.
The team asked for workspace-level retention controls before importing regulated customer notes.
The product saves PMs time when summarizing feedback for roadmap meetings.
Role permissions are confusing because editors can still see reports from deleted workspaces.
The customer said they would expand if reporting permissions and audit exports are finished this quarter.
